title: CSU-SmartScore
description: An intelligent AI-powered quiz scoring system that automates the grading process for handwritten answers. Features instant feedback for students, streamlined answer key management for teachers, and advanced image analysis capabilities.
subtitle: Revolutionize Quiz Grading with AI-Powered Score Analysis

backgroundImage.alt: AI-powered scoring system background with academic elements

features.title: AI-Powered Image Analysis
features.description: Advanced LLM technology extracts meaning from handwritten answers and compares them with answer keys for accurate automated grading.

features.title: Instant Student Feedback
features.description: Students upload photos of handwritten answers and receive immediate feedback and scores, accelerating the learning process.

features.title: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Comprehensive interface for uploading answer keys, viewing student submissions, and overriding AI grading when needed for fairness.

features.title: Smart Grading Override
features.description: Teachers can review and adjust AI-generated scores for edge cases, ensuring fairness and accuracy in the grading process.

author: CSU Development Team
